title: Ho-Oh (rematch)
lead: Trick Room team (Lewis Nield): Chandelure, Rotom-Heat and Lunatone. Boost Rotom-Heat with Nasty Plot, copy the boost to Lunatone (Psych Up) and hammer Ho-Oh with Power Gem (Rock = 4×) under Trick Room. TRIPLE battle.

legend.meaning: EV 252 Def / 58 SpA / 200 SpD · moves: Safeguard, Shadow Ball, Protect, Psych Up.
EV 6 HP / 252 SpA / 252 SpD · moves: HP Ground, Thunderbolt, Light Screen, Nasty Plot.
EV 92 HP / 252 Def / 166 SpA · moves: Trick Room, Power Gem, Protect, Psych Up.

steps.text: TRIPLE battle (3 vs several). Ho-Oh's allies are the 3 legendary beasts: Suicune, Entei and Raikou. 'Swap position' = a triple-battle maneuver: Chandelure swaps places with Lunatone on the field (NOT a switch to the bench).
T1: Chandelure: Safeguard (shields the team from status) + Rotom-Heat: Nasty Plot + Lunatone: {Protect|Lunatone}.
T2: Chandelure: {Protect|Chandelure} + Rotom-Heat: Nasty Plot (reaches +4 Sp. Atk) + Lunatone: Trick Room (slower mons now move first).

T3: Chandelure: swap position with Lunatone + Rotom-Heat: knock out one of the beasts (Thunderbolt on Suicune, HP Ground on Entei/Raikou) + Lunatone: {Psych Up|Lunatone} on Rotom-Heat (copies the +4 Sp. Atk).
T4: Chandelure: swap position with Lunatone + Rotom-Heat: knock out another beast + Lunatone: Power Gem on Ho-Oh (Rock = 4× damage).
T5: Chandelure: swap position with Lunatone + Rotom-Heat: Thunderbolt on Ho-Oh + Lunatone: Power Gem on Ho-Oh.
T6: Chandelure: swap position with Lunatone + Rotom-Heat: knock out the last beast + Lunatone: Power Gem on Ho-Oh.
T7: Chandelure: swap position with Lunatone + Rotom-Heat: Light Screen (cushions the special damage before the rebirth) + Lunatone: Trick Room (refresh — lasts 5 turns).

The Radiant (shiny) Ho-Oh REVIVES with its stats reset — and your boosts also go back to normal. That's why Rotom-Heat uses Nasty Plot again and Chandelure copies it with Psych Up. The Trick Room refreshed on T7 is still active.
T1 (rebirth): Chandelure: {Psych Up|Chandelure} on Rotom-Heat (copies the boost) + Rotom-Heat: Nasty Plot + Lunatone: Power Gem on Ho-Oh.
T2+: Chandelure: Shadow Ball + Rotom-Heat: Thunderbolt + Lunatone: Power Gem — repeat until Ho-Oh faints.
